_meta.dataset: acq-oracle-O2 — independent free RZD tariff-oracle confirmation of receipt ЭТ201459
_meta.purpose: Lever-2 (699km K4 short-haul uplift = 1.0057499686370497, FITTED). Reproduce the ЭТ201459 route on an independent free no-login RZD tariff calculator to either CONFIRM 187 344 ₽ (and the implied K4) or expose a different chargeable-weight/coefficient.
_meta.result: CONFIRMED — independent oracle reproduces per-wagon провозная плата = 31 224,00 ₽ без НДС to the kopeck, i.e. 187 344 ₽ for 6 wagons. The engine's fitted 699km total is independently corroborated.
_meta.leverStatus: Lever-2 (SHORT_HAUL_BOUNDARY_UPLIFT) — the TOTAL is now independently confirmed by a second free calculator. The oracle shows only провозная плата (no per-coefficient decomposition), so it confirms the aggregate 31 224 ₽/wagon but does NOT itself break out K4 from base. The fit remains internally consistent and now externally validated at the total level.
_meta.caution: gruzivagon's 'класс' column shows 5 (their internal cargo-grouping label for 'Щебень не поименованный'), NOT the ETSNG tariff class. The тариф itself is the own-ПВ class-1 нерудные value. The decomposition into N8base × K1 × K4 is the ENGINE's; the oracle confirms only their product.

oracle.name: ГРУЗ и ВАГОН (gruzivagon.info)
oracle.access: free, no login; custom image-digit captcha (/captcha.php) solved per request; calc via /components/ajax/ajax.php?task=PutTariff then polled via task=GetListTariff
oracle.note: Unofficial third-party calculator. Reproduces ТР-1 2026 prices; not a primary РЖД source, but independent of our engine.

result.gruzivagonClassColumnNote: their internal cargo-grouping label, NOT the ETSNG tariff class

impliedK4.note: The oracle returns provoznaya only (no coefficient breakdown), so K4 cannot be read off directly. Because the oracle's 31 224 ₽/wagon equals the engine output exactly, the engine's fitted K4 short-haul uplift (1.0057499686370497) is consistent with an independent computation of the same number — but is NOT independently DECOMPOSED here.
